mapper.sql: id, name, species, breed, age, gender, size, images, traits, health_status, description, status, shelter_location, shelter_contact, is_vaccinated, is_neutered, rescue_story, adoption_fee, view_count, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pets (name, species, breed, age, gender, size, images, traits, health_status, description, status, shelter_location, shelter_contact, is_vaccinated, is_neutered, rescue_story, adoption_fee, view_count, created_at, created_by, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{species}, #{breed}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{size}, #{images}, #{traits}, #{healthStatus}, #{description}, #{status}, #{shelterLocation}, #{shelterContact}, #{isVaccinated}, #{isNeutered}, #{rescueStory}, #{adoptionFee}, 0, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE pets SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pets WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM pets WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM pets WHERE species = #{species} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM pets WHERE status = #{status} AND species = #{species} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM pets WHERE deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR shelter_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pets WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pets WHERE species = #{species} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pets WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE pets SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pets SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
